arts.ttl: Amorim sends message to Van Nistelrooy | 'He's done a great job!'
arts.sum: New Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim admits interim head coach Ruud van Nistelrooy has done a great job in his short time in charge and says he needs to talk to the Dutchman soon to discuss his future at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy mocked for emotional Man Utd farewell – 'Is he still there?'
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy bowed out as Manchester United's interim manager on Sunday with a win over Leicester and his emotional farewell to fans has drawn some ridicule

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy theory raised with Man Utd told what Ruben Amorim will think
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy is awaiting news on his Manchester United future following the appointment of new manager Ruben Amorim and Alan Shearer thinks he knows what will happen next

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim flies to Manchester on a private jet with FIVE assistants as he prepares to get started at Man United... and with so many coaches is this the end for Ruud van Nistelrooy?
arts.sum: The former Sporting Lisbon boss was joined by his five assistants - Carlos Fernandes, Adelio Candido, Paulo Barreira, Emanuel Ferro, and Jorge Vital - on the 11am flight from Beja on Monday.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy reveals when he will learn Man Utd fate under Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy reveals when he will find out if he is staying at Man Utd ahead of Ruben Amorim's arrival as the new head coach.

arts.ttl: Manchester United: Ruben Amorim hints at Ruud van Nistelrooy decision with talks planned on first day
arts.sum: Old Trafford legend’s future is unclear after Erik ten Hag’s exit and the conclusion of his interim tenure in charge

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy leaves three gifts to Manchester United’s anointed one Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Amorim inherits a steadied ship but he will dropped in the deep end when he takes charge of training this week and moulding a flawed squad into his 3-4-3 system will be no easy feat

arts.ttl: Van Nistelrooy is the problem Amorim didn’t need
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim takes the Manchester United head coach job this week facing one big problem that he didn’t expect: Ruud van Nistelrooy. When Amorim accepted the Man Utd job just a couple of weeks ago, it seemed they were a club that couldn’t get any worse.

arts.ttl: Amorim at Man Utd LIVE: New boss forced to miss training as Van Nistelrooy future decided
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim is now the Manchester United manager having waved goodbye to Sporting Lisbon but work permit issues have delayed his arrival, while Ruud van Nistelrooy continues to sweat on his future

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim confirms date for talks with Ruud van Nistelrooy over his Man Utd future
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim took charge of his final match at Sporting Lisbon on Sunday and will now become Manchester United's new manager, succeeding caretaker and club legend Ruud van Nistelrooy
